title: Share Your DevTools Built for Developers
summary: There are a lot of AI wrappers and consumer apps launching right now, but I’m more curious about developer tools people are actually building and using in 2025. Things like: CLI tools deployment platforms debugging tools VS Code extensions infra automation observability tools AI dev workflows open source utilities Some interesting ones I’ve come across recently: Kuberns for AI agentic deployment and infra workflows Cursor for AI assisted development Claude Code for debugging and architecture rea
